fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh token for automatic renewal

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from LinkedIn Ads.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date in the format YYYY-MM-DD. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

custom_description: Connector for the LinkedIn Ads Marketing API. Provides access to ad accounts, campaigns, campaign groups, creatives, conversions, and ad analytics data. Supports OAuth 2.0 and direct access token authentication. Use this connector to retrieve advertising performance metrics, manage campaign structures, and monitor creative assets across your LinkedIn advertising accounts.
supported_questions:
- List all my LinkedIn ad accounts
- Show me all campaigns in my ad account
- List all campaign groups
- Show me the creatives for my campaigns
- List all conversions configured for my ad accounts
- Show me account users for my LinkedIn ads accounts
- Which campaigns have the highest click-through rate?
- What is the total ad spend across all campaigns this month?
- Show me campaigns with status ACTIVE
- Which creatives have the most impressions?
- Compare campaign performance by cost type
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new campaign
- Update campaign budgets
- Delete an ad creative
- Pause a campaign

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results

first_operation.description: Returns a list of ad accounts the authenticated user has access to

parameters.description: Token for the next page of results

account_users.description: Returns a list of users associated with ad accounts

parameters.description: Token for the next page of results

Get a single campaign by ID

campaign_groups.description: Returns a list of campaign groups for an ad account

parameters.name: dateRange
parameters.description: Date range in LinkedIn format, e.g. (start:(year:2024,month:1,day:1),end:(year:2024,month:12,day:31))

parameters.name: campaigns
parameters.description: List of campaign URNs, e.g. List(urn%3Ali%3AsponsoredCampaign%3A123)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of metric fields to return

ad_campaign_analytics.description: Returns ad analytics data pivoted by campaign. Provides performance metrics including clicks, impressions, spend, and engagement data grouped by campaign.

parameters.name: dateRange
parameters.description: Date range in LinkedIn format, e.g. (start:(year:2024,month:1,day:1),end:(year:2024,month:12,day:31))

parameters.name: creatives
parameters.description: List of creative URNs, e.g. List(urn%3Ali%3AsponsoredCreative%3A123)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of metric fields to return

ad_creative_analytics.description: Returns ad analytics data pivoted by creative. Provides performance metrics including clicks, impressions, spend, and engagement data grouped by creative.
